hypothesis: The best model so far uses tweedie_variance_power=1.5 (WRMSSE=0.94488). Hypothesis: add day-of-year (doy) and week-of-year (woy) calendar features to capture annual seasonality more explicitly. The current model uses wday/month/year but not finer-grained annual cycle features. Adding doy and woy may help the model distinguish holiday week patterns more precisely. All other settings match exp_0033.
